checkpoint.summary: unit_053 complete. PHASE_012 CLOSED. skills/development-harness/commands/update.md gained a Step 0 'Schema Version Precheck' that runs validate_harness.py first and rejects mismatched schemas with a verbatim advisory pointing at /create-development-harness + preserving ROADMAP + PHASES + cross-linking SKILL.md § Version upgrades + the 'no migration script is provided by design' policy line + explicit 'Do NOT attempt in-place migration' forbidding. The pre-existing 'Schema migration' row in the Categorize-the-Change table was removed + replaced with a blockquote noting schema_version bumps are not a category. Step 10 'Schema Migration' rewritten to 'Schema Migration (not supported)' with the refusal + redirect. Workspace template mirrors all changes as 'Step 0.5' (sits between the pre-existing 'Step 0: Resolve tool paths' and the main procedure). New test_update_command.py (230 LOC, 9 cases) covers both halves of the acceptance: TestV1FixtureTripsSchemaMismatch (2) seeds a v1-shaped workspace and invokes validate_harness.py exactly as the doc instructs, asserting returncode 1 + '/create-development-harness' + all 4 JSON filenames in the joined errors; TestUpdateDocsCarryPrecheckContract (7) pins the doc-shape contract across BOTH docs (precheck section, validate_harness naming, 'older schema' pointer, verbatim 'no migration script is provided by design', SKILL.md Version upgrades cross-link, 'Do NOT attempt' forbidding) + a long-doc-specific assertion that the pre-unit_053 Schema migration table row is gone. PHASE_012 final summary: unit_051 (readiness checklist + 13 tests), unit_052 (Version upgrades section + 8 tests), unit_053 (update-command precheck + 9 tests). Suite 291 -> 321. pr-review-checklist: all 3 units have validation_evidence; no linter/type errors (stdlib-only); tests pass 320/321 + 1 OS skip; not deploy-affecting; phase doc + checkpoint + state current. PHASE_012 marked completed.
checkpoint.next_action: Open PHASE_012 PR (feat/phase-012-release-readiness -> main), run code-review, squash-merge per harness-git.md autonomous-merge authorization. THEN begin PHASE_013 unit_054: create skills/development-harness/scripts/tests/fixtures/self-test/ throwaway workspace with a 2-phase / 6-unit mini-CRUD roadmap designed to exercise a batch >= 2 plus one merge conflict and one scope violation. This is the start of the harness-self-test phase -- the harness uses its own parallel machinery against a throwaway project to verify end-to-end correctness.
